_comment: Curated, human-verified pins for the model-catalog regeneration pipeline (Block BD / T768). Keyed by catalog vendor (lower-case). Each entry MUST carry `id`; any other ModelEntry field it sets is merged with precedence ABOVE LiteLLM and (normally) BELOW the live vendor API. Add `"__pin": true` to force a field to win over EVERYTHING — use only for facts you have personally verified and never want a noisy source to clobber. Fields you omit here are still filled by the automated sources. This file is itself an ANCHORING source: a pinned id is admitted even when no live vendor API / committed entry vouches for it (LiteLLM then enriches it) — this is how a brand-new vendor row is seeded. LiteLLM, by contrast, only enriches and can never introduce an id on its own. Keep entries minimal — a pin is a claim you are standing behind.
